title: Enable JavaScript
text: Enable JavaScript Determines whether JavaScript is allowed to be executed in the widget. True (default) or False . Value Description True (default) Allow JavaScript to be executed in the widget. False Do not allow JavaScript to be executed in the widget. Usage Dynamic? No Supported in Grid? No Dependencies: None Description When enabled, you can use JavaScript to call extended triggers. Using in ProcScript This is a static property. It cannot be set in ProcScript. Applies To uhtml (HTML Widget) Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
